mapper.select: SELECT * FROM projects WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM projects WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND updated_at > #{since} ORDER BY updated_at ASC
SELECT * FROM projects WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects (user_id, name, color, icon, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{color}, #{icon}, #{updatedAt}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
